title: helictochloa dahurica
intro: Helictochloa dahurica, also known as Korean sweet grass or Korean mountain rice grass, is a type of grass native to East Asia and is used in traditional medicine. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Helictochloa dahurica include its potential to reduce stress, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, as well as its use in treating conditions such as fever and cough. In herbal preparations, Helictochloa dahurica is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also dried or powdered for use in capsules or topical applications.
